scripts.build: cd dashboard && npm install && npm run build && cd ../client-dashboard && npm install && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: export VITE_SUPABASE_URL="$SUPABASE_URL" && export VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" && npm run build && rm -rf public && mkdir public && cp -rv dashboard/dist/* public/ && mkdir -p public/customers && cp -rv client-dashboard/dist/* public/customers/
